installCommand: cd admin-web && npm install --include=dev && cd ../dashboard-web && npm install --include=dev && cd ../super-admin-web && npm install --include=dev && cd ../backend && npm install --include=dev
buildCommand: cd admin-web && npm run build && cd ../dashboard-web && npm run build && cd ../super-admin-web && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/copy-builds.js
